protocol_notes: Second order from new vendor. Vials arrived without professional labels, only sharpie markings. Powder appeared clogged on inner vial walls. Vendor later explained labels were removed per customer request to minimize delivery risks. Vendor provided picture of labeled vials and capping machine with note containing customer name and date. Ordered 1x 10mg BPC-157 and 2x 10mg TB-500 with BAC water for $180. Vendor has Janoshik certificates and positive reviews on community forum.
